title: Mangrove+
description: New fresh structures,mobs and features to the Mangrove Swamp biome.
body:
A small and simple mod that adds new structures and mobs to the mangrove swamps

Currently you can find 4 structures in the mangrove with each their own story.

 

 

 

 

Features that are planned for the future:

- More Firefly bushes (They are a bit to rare)
  
- Mangrove invested zombies
  
- Mangrove invested Spiders (Might not be added)
  
- Mangrove illager estates (structure)
  
- Small mangrove villages
  
- Dense Mangrove Swamp (Bassicaly a mangrove swamp but bigger and more dense trees)
  
- Rooted armor
  
- Rooted cave (structure)
  
- Big dead mangrove trees (uncommon)
  
________________________________________

 

If you want to use this mod in a modpack you can!
